info.title: Assured Platform API
info.description:
Welcome to the Assured Platform API

This API documentation provides all necessary information for developers to integrate with the Assured platform.

Assured is designed with an API-first approach, meaning APIs are designed and developed first, with user interfaces built on top. This makes the APIs reusable, robust, and easy to integrate for third-party developers.

Please note that the API and platform are under active development and subject to significant changes, including breaking changes. Refer to this documentation regularly for the most up-to-date information.

API Key Authentication

Use your account API key to authenticate. If you don't have an API key, get in touch with us by reaching out to support@withassured.com.

Add the API key to the header of your requests.

headers: {'x-api-key': 'YOUR_SECRET_TOKEN'}

tags.description: Endpoints related to provider management and provider invitations

get.summary: Retrieve a paginated list of users
get.description: Retrieves a list of users with optional filters and pagination.

parameters.name: is_active
parameters.description: Filter users by active status.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Which field to use when ordering the results.

parameters.name: provider_profile__ready_for_credentialing
parameters.description: Filter users by provider profile ready for credentialing status.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A search term.

parameters.name: user_type
parameters.description: Filter users by their user type.

parameters.name: users_deactivated
parameters.description: Filter users by deactivated status.

parameters.name: users_invited
parameters.description: Filter users by invited status.

next.description: URL to the next page of results, if available.

previous.description: URL to the previous page of results, if available.

get.summary: Retrieve a paginated list of provider accounts
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of provider accounts. Results can be filtered, searched, and ordered using various query parameters.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Filter results by email

parameters.name: first_name
parameters.description: Filter results by first name

parameters.name: id_in
parameters.description: Filter results by a comma-separated list of Provider IDs

parameters.name: last_name
parameters.description: Filter results by last name

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page

parameters.name: npi
parameters.description: Filter results by NPI (National Provider Identifier)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Initial index from which to return the results

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Field to use when ordering the results

parameters.name: profile_completeness
parameters.description: Filter results by profile completeness

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term for filtering across multiple fields

id.description: Use this ID for provider wherever required in all APIs except Provider Profile

provider_profile_id.description: Use this ID for APIs under Provider Profile module

post.description:
Sends invitation emails to providers to join the platform.
Multiple providers can be invited at once.
Imports a single provider using their CAQH credentials.

provider_practice_locations.description: Use the get API Retrieve Practice Locations for practice location ID

200.description: Import Single Provider with CAQH response

post.description: Endpoint to create a new provider user in the system.

get.summary: Retrieve expirable tasks
get.description: Retrieve a list of expirable tasks with optional filters.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Filter by archived status.

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: Assignee ID for filtering.

parameters.name: client_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated client IDs for filtering.

parameters.name: created_at_after
parameters.description: Filter tasks created after the specified date.

parameters.name: created_at_before
parameters.description: Filter tasks created before the specified date.

parameters.name: due_on_after
parameters.description: Filter tasks with due dates after the specified date.

parameters.name: due_on_before
parameters.description: Filter tasks with due dates before the specified date.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Initial index for paginated results.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Field to use for ordering results.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term to filter results.

parameters.name: updated_at_after
parameters.description: Filter tasks updated after the specified date.

parameters.name: updated_at_before
parameters.description: Filter tasks updated before the specified date.
